chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 151 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 12.06.2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahid Hussain Jogi, Advocate for respondents No.4 and 5. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.4 and 5 has filed a statement stating therein that cheque No.53231647 dated 11.06.2025 has been handed over to the petitioner; photocopy of the same has also been furnished showing payment of an amount of Rs.50,000/-. However, regarding the remaining amount of Rs.1,87,034/- i.e. arrears of the pensionary benefits, learned Counsel submits that the same shall be paid in equal installments of Rs.50,000/- from the coming month. Accordingly, learned Counsel for the petitioner, expressing his satisfaction, seeks disposal of this petition, which is disposed of in the above terms. In case of non-compliance, respondents shall face contempt proceedings. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
